commands: if [ -f /root/platform/data/visual-equivalence/logs/run.pid ]; then PID=$(cat /root/platform/data/visual-equivalence/logs/run.pid); ps -p $PID > /dev/null && echo "run.pid=$PID ALIVE" || echo "run.pid=$PID DEAD"; fi

/usr/bin/python3.11 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('/root/platform/data/visual-equivalence/replay/manifest.json')); p=m.get('progress',{}); print(f\"Phase B progress: {p.get('done','?')}/{p.get('total','?')} success={p.get('success','?')} session_lost={p.get('session_lost','?')}\")" 2>/dev/null || echo 'no Phase B manifest yet'
